properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Before He promised him a child, God looked at Abraham and smiled, God already knew.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: With Isaac on the alter lay God knew He′d spare his life that day God already knew

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Trust the heart of Jesus when the sun will not break through And when taken by surprise know that God already knew God already knew

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Before He heard his sister's cry God knew that Lazarus would rise God already knew

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: And before He healed that crippled man God knew that he would walk again God already knew

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Before your heart was made to break God knew that He would make a way God already knew

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: And before you face tomorrow′s task God sees it all as in the past God already knew
